name_cn:
Top-tier Original, Code-changed Chip
Authentic Development, Steel Hardware
M47096 Monogram, M47162 Yellow Flower
Just In Case Bag revisits the brand's travel heritage, featuring a compact silhouette crafted with Monogram canvas and leather trim. It accommodates essentials like a phone, keys, and cosmetics. Locks and key pouch highlight classic details, while the leather woven chain and shoulder strap are detachable for versatile carrying options.
13 x 14 x 11.5 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
